title: hieracium hepaticum
intro: Hieracium hepaticum, also known as liverwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Hieracium hepaticum are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been traditionally used to treat liver and gallbladder issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and improve liver function. Hieracium hepaticum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support liver health and alleviate symptoms of jaundice and liver disease.
